frontmatter.description: LLM provider is rate-limiting requests (HTTP 429 from the model API)

signature.embedding_seed: llm provider rate limit 429 token quota model api

body:
## When this fires
The LLM provider is returning 429s. Causes: a feature shipped that loops over the model, an offline backfill running in foreground, or a tier change at the provider side.

## Playbook
1. Plot llm-call-volume by feature and route to find the dominant caller.
2. Read provider-status for any in-flight provider incident affecting throughput.
3. Check recent-deploys-svc for new code paths that increased token usage.
